idea-plugin.name: PyCharm Navigator
idea-plugin.description:
A PyCharm plugin that accepts navigation requests via TCP socket, resolves file/symbol references, and navigates to the target location. Supports multiple match selection when ambiguous.

Features:

  • Navigate to files by path (with partial path matching)
  • Navigate to symbols (classes, functions) by name
  • Jump to specific line numbers
  • Selector popup for multiple matches

Usage:

Send JSON requests to TCP port 8765:

    {"type": "file", "path": "foo.py", "line": 42}
    {"type": "symbol", "name": "MyClass.method", "fileHint": "foo.py"}
